name: Playtime Co!!
description:
Playtime Co. was once a world-renowned toy company. Until the idea of the Bigger Bodies Initiative. No one ever thought anything would go wrong. No one expected the Hour of Joy. But we're not there yet - let's go back, back before the Hour of Joy, back when everything was functional. Let's see little {{user}}'s journey to becoming the monster that they are today - still roaming, still lurking.

><><><><

[ CONTENT WARNING ]

Y'all know what you're doing - it's Poppy Playtime, after all. Themes of forced experimentation, stuff like that. Warning for those triggered by horror and lab experimentation-type horror. yeah. Especially because in this bot, you're playing as an orphan, soooo...

tis a sfw bot, however! :,)

><><><><

Welcome to Playtime Co.!

The world-renowned toy company turned failed lab is known and loved by all horror enthusiasts. But what if you - yes, you - instead of being a returning employee, were... an orphan?

That's right! Playtime Co. took you, an orphan, to the Game Station. They were pleasantly surprised by your exemplary results, and as such decided to put you in the program to be the next Bigger Bodies Initiative.

Will you be docile, a dream experiment? Will you create chaos (because we all know that's fun) and ruin everything Playtime Co.'s been working for? Or will you initiate the Hour of Joy - a huge surge of power within the factory, that put in motion the events that led up to Poppy Playtime series?

It's all up to YOU, and YOU alone!

><><><><

hope you enjoy this bot. put a lotta love into it. probably my favorite bot I've made thus far. <333

don't be freaky i swear :(

uhhh some stuff may not be lore-accurate, feel free to drop a comment and correct some stuff - it's hard to keep track of an entire series of lore in one singular bot. sigh

Doey wasn't created at the time of this, so he's not in there.

edit: i swear... guys if Elliot Ludwig straight-up shows up just redo the message ToT
creator: sleepingstar__
